Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class IndustriesLoyaltySettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.IndustriesLoyaltySettings
public class IndustriesLoyaltySettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for IndustriesLoyaltySettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="IndustriesLoyaltySettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableAutomaticMemberTierAssessmentSelection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAutomaticVoucherCodeGeneration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableFixedTypeNQPAggregation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLoyaltyApiAccessForExternalSiteUsers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLoyaltyRedeemedPointsExpirationInfoPref" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLoyaltyRulesVerifyCdpMemberSegment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableLoyaltyServiceExcellence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNQPRealTimePointBalance" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableNonQualifyingPointsConsolidation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableQPRealTimePointBalance" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
